_description: Expected outputs for Mirzai Group LLC dba Munchies Market. RECONCILED 2026-04-15 against signed FINAL Loan Report dated 1-16-2026 (21pp, Colony SBSL archive).

_reconciliation_notes.bani_match: $1 delta (engine $76,269 vs memo $76,268 — Decimal vs memo rounding)
_reconciliation_notes.global_dscr_variance: 0.02 (engine 1.65 vs memo 1.63). Adapter aggregates K-1 distributions from 3 affiliates as other_income; memo models each affiliate's CF and DS independently. Variance is expected and acceptable for a single-entity engine.
_reconciliation_notes.engine_tax_allocation_gap: Engine models tax deduction only via required_distributions field. Memo applied $119 tax allocation — captured in fixture.
